name: Roasted-Pepper-Tomato Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 7 oz jar roasted red peppers, diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook linguine in a large pot of boiling water according to package directions.
2. Meanwhile, heat oil in a medium-size skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Add onion; cook until softened, about 2 minutes.
4. Add red peppers, garlic, chili pepper and tomatoes; cook, uncovered, until bubbling vigorously, about 4 minutes.
5. Stir in salt, pepper and basil; cook 1 minute.
6. Remove chili pepper.
7. Drain pasta; toss with sauce in a large serving bowl.
8. Sprinkle with cheese if desired.
